title: Running native SAINTexpress on simulated input

title: Running native SAINTexpress on simulated input
text: generator saintexpress vignette.
code: simulate_si <- function(seed = 42, mode = c("spc", "int")) {   mode <- match.arg(mode)   set.seed(seed)   preys  <- paste0("Prey", 1:6)   baits  <- c("BaitA", "BaitA", "BaitB", "BaitB", "Ctrl1", "Ctrl2")   ips    <- paste0("IP", seq_along(baits))   cort   <- c("T", "T", "T", "T", "C", "C")    draw <- function(bait, prey) {     if (bait %in% c("Ctrl1", "Ctrl2")) {       if (mode == "spc") stats::rpois(1, 0.5) else stats::rexp(1, 1 / 1e4)     } else if (bait == "BaitA" && prey %in% c("Prey1", "Prey2")) {       if (mode == "spc") stats::rpois(1, 20) else stats::rexp(1, 1 / 1e7)     } else if (bait == "BaitB" && prey %in% c("Prey3", "Prey4")) {       if (mode == "spc") stats::rpois(1, 15) else stats::rexp(1, 1 / 5e6)     } else {       if (mode == "spc") stats::rpois(1, 0.5) else stats::rexp(1, 1 / 1e4)     }   }    rows <- list()   for (i in seq_along(baits)) {     for (p in preys) {       q <- draw(baits[i], p)       if (q > 0) {         rows[[length(rows) + 1]] <- data.frame(           ipId = ips[i], baitId = baits[i], preyId = p, quant = q,           stringsAsFactors = FALSE         )       }     }   }   list(     inter = do.call(rbind, rows),     prey  = data.frame(preyId = preys, preyLength = 500L, preyGeneId = preys,                        stringsAsFactors = FALSE),     bait  = data.frame(ipId = ips, baitId = baits, CorT = cort,                        stringsAsFactors = FALSE)   ) }

what: Spectral-count scoring with the native binary
title: Running native SAINTexpress on simulated input
text: Top hits per bait — true interactors rank first AvgP:
code: si_spc <- simulate_si(mode = "spc") workdir <- tempfile("saintexpressbin-spc-") dir.create(workdir) res_spc <- saintexpressbin::saintexpress_run(   si_spc,   type = "spc",   workdir = workdir,   cleanup = TRUE,   use_docker = FALSE ) #> Input files are: /tmp/Rtmp4kJROS/saintexpressbin-spc-1e732871512f/inter.txt, /tmp/Rtmp4kJROS/saintexpressbin-spc-1e732871512f/prey.txt, /tmp/Rtmp4kJROS/saintexpressbin-spc-1e732871512f/bait.txt #> Interaction file: "/tmp/Rtmp4kJROS/saintexpressbin-spc-1e732871512f/inter.txt" #> Prey file: "/tmp/Rtmp4kJROS/saintexpressbin-spc-1e732871512f/prey.txt" #> Bait file: "/tmp/Rtmp4kJROS/saintexpressbin-spc-1e732871512f/bait.txt" #> GO file: "" #> Parsing prey file /tmp/Rtmp4kJROS/saintexpressbin-spc-1e732871512f/prey.txt ...done. #> Parsing prey file /tmp/Rtmp4kJROS/saintexpressbin-spc-1e732871512f/bait.txt ...done. #> Parsing interaction file /tmp/Rtmp4kJROS/saintexpressbin-spc-1e732871512f/inter.txt ...done. #> Setting matrix indices for each interaction...done. #> Creating matrix...done. #> Creating a list of unique interactions...done. res_spc$list[, c("Bait", "Prey", "AvgP", "BFDR", "SaintScore")] #>    Bait  Prey AvgP BFDR SaintScore #> 1 BaitA Prey1 1.00 0.00       1.00 #> 2 BaitA Prey2 1.00 0.00       1.00 #> 3 BaitA Prey4 0.00 0.26       0.00 #> 4 BaitA Prey6 0.05 0.12       0.05 #> 5 BaitA Prey5 0.38 0.00       0.38 #> 6 BaitB Prey3 1.00 0.00       1.00 #> 7 BaitB Prey4 1.00 0.00       1.00 #> 8 BaitB Prey2 0.00 0.26       0.00 #> 9 BaitB Prey6 0.00 0.26       0.00 top_per_bait <- function(df) {   df <- df[order(df$Bait, -df$AvgP), ]   do.call(rbind, by(df, df$Bait, head, 2)) } top_per_bait(res_spc$list)[, c("Bait", "Prey", "AvgP", "BFDR")] #>          Bait  Prey AvgP BFDR #> BaitA.1 BaitA Prey1    1    0 #> BaitA.2 BaitA Prey2    1    0 #> BaitB.6 BaitB Prey3    1    0 #> BaitB.7 BaitB Prey4    1    0

title: Running native SAINTexpress on simulated input
text: native result includes FoldChange BFDR. plot effect-size coordinate (EFC, log2(FoldChange)) false-discovery coordinate.
code: plot_volcano <- function(scores, title) {   volcano_data <- scores   volcano_data$EFC <- log2(volcano_data$FoldChange)   volcano_data$neg_log10_bfdr <- -log10(pmax(volcano_data$BFDR, 1e-16))   volcano_data$is_hit <- volcano_data$BFDR <= 0.05 & volcano_data$EFC >= 1    plot(     volcano_data$EFC,     volcano_data$neg_log10_bfdr,     pch = 19,     col = ifelse(volcano_data$is_hit, "#B23A48", "#3D6F99"),     xlab = "EFC (log2 fold change)",     ylab = "-log10(BFDR)",     main = title   )   abline(h = -log10(0.05), lty = 2, col = "grey40")   abline(v = 1, lty = 2, col = "grey40")   text(     volcano_data$EFC,     volcano_data$neg_log10_bfdr,     labels = paste(volcano_data$Bait, volcano_data$Prey, sep = ":"),     pos = 3,     cex = 0.7   ) } plot_volcano(res_spc$list, "Native SAINTexpress spectral-count volcano plot")

what: Intensity scoring with the native binary
title: Running native SAINTexpress on simulated input
code: si_int <- simulate_si(mode = "int") workdir <- tempfile("saintexpressbin-int-") dir.create(workdir) res_int <- saintexpressbin::saintexpress_run(   si_int,   type = "int",   workdir = workdir,   cleanup = TRUE,   use_docker = FALSE ) #> Input files are: /tmp/Rtmp4kJROS/saintexpressbin-int-1e7316dbbac/inter.txt, /tmp/Rtmp4kJROS/saintexpressbin-int-1e7316dbbac/prey.txt, /tmp/Rtmp4kJROS/saintexpressbin-int-1e7316dbbac/bait.txt #> Interaction file: "/tmp/Rtmp4kJROS/saintexpressbin-int-1e7316dbbac/inter.txt" #> Prey file: "/tmp/Rtmp4kJROS/saintexpressbin-int-1e7316dbbac/prey.txt" #> Bait file: "/tmp/Rtmp4kJROS/saintexpressbin-int-1e7316dbbac/bait.txt" #> GO file: "" #> Parsing prey file /tmp/Rtmp4kJROS/saintexpressbin-int-1e7316dbbac/prey.txt ...done. #> Parsing prey file /tmp/Rtmp4kJROS/saintexpressbin-int-1e7316dbbac/bait.txt ...done. #> Parsing interaction file /tmp/Rtmp4kJROS/saintexpressbin-int-1e7316dbbac/inter.txt ...done. #> Setting matrix indices for each interaction...done. #> Creating matrix...done. #> Creating a list of unique interactions...done. #> L is larger than the number of control IPs. top_per_bait(res_int$list)[, c("Bait", "Prey", "AvgP", "BFDR")] #>           Bait  Prey AvgP BFDR #> BaitA.1  BaitA Prey1    1    0 #> BaitA.2  BaitA Prey2    1    0 #> BaitB.9  BaitB Prey3    1    0 #> BaitB.10 BaitB Prey4    1    0 plot_volcano(res_int$list, "Native SAINTexpress intensity volcano plot")

title: SAINTexpress Native Binaries and Runner
text: saintexpressbin ships SAINTexpress native executables provides small R runner prepared SAINT input data. package owns native execution details: resolving platform-specific binary, writing SAINT input files, running native executable Docker, reading list.txt, cleaning generated files. prepare prolfqua data objects; integration belongs prolfquasaint. pure-R implementation scoring, see saintexpress.

title: SAINTexpress Native Binaries and Runner
SAINTexpress Native Binaries and Runner
text: package expects binaries layout: Unix binaries must executable package source installation.
code: inst/bin/Darwin/SAINTexpress-spc inst/bin/Darwin/SAINTexpress-int inst/bin/Linux64/SAINTexpress-spc inst/bin/Linux64/SAINTexpress-int inst/bin/Windows64/SAINTexpress-spc.exe inst/bin/Windows64/SAINTexpress-int.exe

title: SAINTexpress Native Binaries and Runner
text: Prepare SAINT input list data frames named inter, prey, bait: Run spectral-count binary: Run intensity binary: saintexpress_run() writes inter.txt, prey.txt, bait.txt workdir, runs SAINTexpress, reads list.txt, returns list : listFile: data frame containing list.txt path. list: parsed SAINTexpress result table. : captured process output. Use cleanup = FALSE keep generated input output files inspection: macOS, Docker used automatically native binary available. Set use_docker = TRUE force Docker, use_docker = FALSE require native binary.
code: si <- list(   inter = inter,   prey = prey,   bait = bait ) result <- saintexpressbin::saintexpress_run(si, type = "spc") result <- saintexpressbin::saintexpress_run(si, type = "int") result <- saintexpressbin::saintexpress_run(   si,   type = "spc",   workdir = tempdir(),   cleanup = FALSE )

title: SAINTexpress Native Binaries and Runner
text: SAINTexpress SAINT model described original publications: Teo G, Liu G, Zhang J, Nesvizhskii AI, Gingras AC, Choi H (2014). SAINTexpress: improvements additional features Significance Analysis INTeractome software. Journal Proteomics 100:37-43. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jprot.2013.10.023 Choi H, Glatter T, Gstaiger M, Nesvizhskii AI (2012). SAINT-MS1: protein-protein interaction scoring using label-free intensity data affinity purification-mass spectrometry experiments. Journal Proteome Research 11:2619-2624. https://doi.org/10.1021/pr201185r Choi H, Larsen B, Lin ZY, Breitkreutz , Mellacheruvu D, Fermin D, Qin ZS, Tyers M, Gingras AC, Nesvizhskii AI (2011). SAINT: probabilistic scoring affinity purification-mass spectrometry data. Nature Methods 8:70-73. https://doi.org/10.1038/nmeth.1541

what: Run SAINTexpress on prepared input — saintexpress_run
title: Run SAINTexpress on prepared input — saintexpress_run
text: Writes inter.txt, prey.txt, bait.txt workdir, runs bundled native binary, Docker macOS native binary available (use_docker = TRUE).

title: Run SAINTexpress on prepared input — saintexpress_run
code: saintexpress_run(   si,   type = c("spc", "int"),   workdir = getwd(),   cleanup = TRUE,   use_docker = NULL )

title: Run SAINTexpress on prepared input — saintexpress_run
text: si Named list elements inter, prey, bait (data frames). type "spc" (spectral counts) "int" (intensities). workdir Directory write inputs read list.txt . Defaults getwd(). cleanup TRUE, remove generated files reading results. use_docker NULL (auto: native first, Docker fallback macOS), TRUE force Docker, FALSE require native binary.

title: Run SAINTexpress on prepared input — saintexpress_run
text: List elements listFile (data frame path), list (parsed list.txt), (data frame run log).

title: Run SAINTexpress on prepared input — saintexpress_run
code: si <- list(   inter = data.frame(     ipId = c("IP1", "IP1", "IP2", "IP2", "IP3", "IP4"),     baitId = c("BaitA", "BaitA", "BaitA", "BaitA", "Ctrl", "Ctrl"),     preyId = c("Prey1", "Prey2", "Prey1", "Prey2", "Prey1", "Prey2"),     quant = c(20, 1, 18, 1, 1, 1)   ),   prey = data.frame(     preyId = c("Prey1", "Prey2"),     preyLength = c(500, 500),     preyGeneId = c("Gene1", "Gene2")   ),   bait = data.frame(     ipId = c("IP1", "IP2", "IP3", "IP4"),     baitId = c("BaitA", "BaitA", "Ctrl", "Ctrl"),     CorT = c("T", "T", "C", "C")   ) ) if (nzchar(saintexpress_executable("spc"))) {   workdir <- tempfile("saintexpressbin-")   dir.create(workdir)   saintexpress_run(si, type = "spc", workdir = workdir, use_docker = FALSE) } #> Input files are: title: saintexpressbin 0.0.1
text: Initial package release platform-specific SAINTexpress executables R runner prepared SAINT input tables.
